title: Frontend Engineer (React.js)
description:
We are seeking a mid-level Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for building responsive and user-friendly interfaces for our web applications.

Responsibilities:
- Develop high-quality frontend code using React.js and GraphQL
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing UI components
- Work with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration with backend services
- Optimize application performance and ensure accessibility
- Troubleshoot and debug issues in a fast-paced environment
- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- React.js
- GraphQL
- HTML5
- Bootstrap
- CSS3
- Responsive web design
- Browser compatibility

Nice to have:
- Redux
- Jest
- Webpack
